<div id="welcome-splash" class="welcome-splash" hidden aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="welcome-splash__backdrop"></div>
  <div class="welcome-splash__panel">
    <p class="welcome-splash__greeting">Welcome to Deneken's website..</p>
    <div class="welcome-splash__burst" aria-label="Research concepts">
      <span class="welcome-concept" style="--i:0">Computational Social Science</span>
      <span class="welcome-concept" style="--i:1">Democracy</span>
      <span class="welcome-concept" style="--i:2">ABM</span>
      <span class="welcome-concept" style="--i:3">LLM</span>
      <span class="welcome-concept" style="--i:4">Political Violence</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  if (sessionStorage.getItem("welcome-seen-v5")) return;
  if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) {
    sessionStorage.setItem("welcome-seen-v5", "1");
    return;
  }

  var splash = document.getElementById("welcome-splash");
  if (!splash) return;
  var isMobile = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 767px)").matches;
  var exitAt = isMobile ? 900 : 1200;
  var removeAt = isMobile ? 1200 : 1600;

  splash.hidden = false;
  splash.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
  document.body.classList.add("welcome-active");

  requestAnimationFrame(function () {
    splash.classList.add("is-visible");
  });

  window.setTimeout(function () {
    splash.classList.add("is-exiting");
  }, exitAt);

  window.setTimeout(function () {
    splash.classList.remove("is-visible", "is-exiting");
    splash.hidden = true;
    splash.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
    document.body.classList.remove("welcome-active");
    sessionStorage.setItem("welcome-seen-v5", "1");
  }, removeAt);
});
</script>
